chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-2219 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on office objection No.18 2. For hearing of main case 21-02-2025 Mr. Muhammad Haroon Shaikh Advocate for Petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General In view of the judgment of D.B. of this Court vide Judgment dated 13.10.2021 passed in C.P. No.755 of 2020 (Sukkur), this petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
